title: MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Maharshi Dayanand University has released the MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 for May examinations under NEP-2020 and CBCS schemes. Check semester-wise exam schedule and download the official PDF at mdu.ac.in.

sections.heading: MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Out

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University has officially released the Theory Date Sheet 2026 for UG and PG programmes including Re-appear examinations for May 2026. The date sheets cover various courses such as M.Lib. Info. Sci., BCA, BTTM, B.Lib. & Inf. Sci., and PG Diploma programmes under NEP and CBCS schemes. Students can now download the official MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 from the university website.

sections.heading: MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Overview
MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Maharshi Dayanand University has released multiple theory date sheets for May 2026 examinations. The schedules include Regular, Re-appear, and Improvement examinations for several UG and PG programmes.

sections.heading: How to Download MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 from the official university portal by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official website of Maharshi Dayanand University.
Navigate to the Examination or Date Sheet section.
Look for the Theory Date Sheet May 2026 links.
Click on your respective course and semester date sheet.
The PDF will open. Download and save the file on your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Note: Always refer to the official MDU date sheet and check all dates and instructions carefully before the examinations.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 contains all essential information for students. The key details mentioned in the date sheets are:

items: Programme name and semester
Examination date and day
Subject name with paper code
Timing of each paper
Student categories (Regular / Re-appear / Improvement)
Important instructions for candidates.

sections.heading: MDU UG & PG Reappear Date Sheet 2026 Important Links

items: Official Date Sheet Portal: Click Here
Official Website: Click Here
